channel.title: TGRoss
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGRoss, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Season of Volatility
item.description: Hey, Ross here: I’ve been talking so much about the current market rotation that it’s easy to forget we’re still in earnings season. And as today’s ch...

item.title: From Losers to Winners
item.description: Hey, Ross here: The sideways chop continues in the major indexes. As I said yesterday – it’s an extremely frustrating market for “S&P 500 or Nasdaq on...

item.title: An Extremely Frustrating Market
item.description: Hey, Ross here: It must be pretty frustrating to be an “S&P 500 only” index investor right now. Today’s charts show you why. Chart of the Day For the ...

item.title: A “Permanent” Market Rotation?
item.description: Hey, Ross here: If you’ve been reading this newsletter… Then you know I’ve been banging the table on the market rotation for quite a while now (and I’...

item.title: Is the Market Bottom Over?
item.description: The government shutdown hasn’t hit the markets yet, but it’s about to stir things up. With key economic data, like job numbers, delayed indefinitely, ...
